title: Paying the Bill 结账买单

lines.en: That was a delicious meal. I am so full!
Me too. Should we pay the bill now?
lines.zh: 我也是。我们现在结账吧？

lines.en: Yes. Excuse me, can we have the check, please?
It is eighty-five yuan in total.
Do you want to split the bill?
No, it is my treat today. My pleasure!
lines.zh: 不用，今天我请客。我的荣幸！

lines.en: Thank you, Tom! That is very kind of you.
I can pay by phone. Do they take mobile pay?
lines.zh: 我可以用手机付。他们接受手机支付吗？

lines.en: Yes. Let me scan the QR code on the table.
lines.zh: 是的。让我扫一下桌上的二维码。
